questions.question: Define Distributed Systems and explain its characteristics. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Distributed Systems: A collection of interconnected nodes or computers that work together to achieve a common goal.

questions.question: A distributed system is characterized by its distribution of resources. What are the two types of resources that can be distributed in a distributed system? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Two types of resources: (i) Human resources (ii) Computer resources

questions.question: Explain the concept of Scalability in distributed systems. How can it be achieved? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Scalability: The ability of a distributed system to handle increased load by adding more resources. It can be achieved through horizontal scaling (adding more nodes) and vertical scaling (upgrading existing nodes)
